suggestions.title: Ensure consistent max-width containers
suggestions.description: Not all content appears to be wrapped in a consistent max-width container. Use a shared layout wrapper (e.g., max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4) to keep content readable on large screens.

suggestions.title: Break up very dense bullet sections
suggestions.description: There are many bullet lists on the homepage. Consider grouping related bullets into cards or columns to improve visual rhythm and scanning.
